hero.description: Your centralized cybersecurity intelligence interface. Analyze IPs, inspect domains, generate hashes, and query AI-powered threat intelligence — all in one place.

blogList.title: Intelligence

ipIntelligence.metaDescription: Trace any IP address — geolocation, ISP, ASN, and VPN/proxy detection. Free IP lookup tool.
ipIntelligence.title: IP
ipIntelligence.description: Enter an IP address to trace its global origin, ASN, and ISP details.

easterEggs.localhost: THERE IS NO PLACE LIKE 127.0.0.1 [LOCALHOST / LOOPBACK]
easterEggs.private: INTERNAL SYSTEM DETECTED [PRIVATE NETWORK IP - NOT PUBLICLY ROUTABLE]
easterEggs.detectFailed: DETECTION FAILED [COULD NOT RESOLVE YOUR IP]

error.title: Resolution Failed
error.fallback: Uplink severed. Unable to resolve IP.

domainAnalyzer.metaDescription: DNS records lookup, SSL certificate inspection, SPF and DMARC email security analysis. Free domain intelligence tool.
domainAnalyzer.title: Domain
domainAnalyzer.description: Comprehensive DNS, SSL, and security posture analysis.

hashGenerator.metaDescription: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384 and SHA-512 hashes from text or files. All operations run locally in your browser.
hashGenerator.title: Hash
hashGenerator.description: Generate cryptographically secure digests for data & file integrity.
hashGenerator.placeholder: Paste text, drag & drop a file, or click 'Select File'...
hashGenerator.fileError: ERROR: Unable to read file or file is too large.

verification.title: Hash Verification
verification.description: Paste an expected hash to compare.

hashGenerator.securityNotice: Terminal operates in offline mode. Cryptographic operations are performed locally via Web Crypto API. Zero data leaves this machine.

base64.metaDescription: Encode and decode Base64 strings and files directly in your browser. Supports drag & drop file upload with zero data transmission.
base64.title: Base64
base64.description: Encode text or files to Base64, or decode Base64 back to text or file.

placeholders.encode: Enter text to encode, select a file, or drag & drop...
placeholders.decode: Paste Base64 here, select a file, or drag & drop...

errors.cannotDecode: Invalid Base64 — cannot decode to file.

base64.securityNotice: All encoding/decoding operations are performed locally in your browser. Zero data leaves this machine.

ai.title: AEGIS
ai.subtitle: Cybersecurity expert AI. Ask about threats, network analysis, vulnerability assessment, and more.
suggestions: How does a VPN protect my traffic?
ai.disclaimer: AEGIS may produce inaccurate information. Verify critical security advice independently.

disclaimer.title: ⚠️ Legal & Ethical Disclaimer
disclaimer.consent: You must have explicit, mutual consent from the target system's owner before running any exploits, payloads, or scans.
